title: elatostematoides manillensis var. panayana
intro: Elatostematoides manillensis var. panayana, also known as Elatostema manillensis var. panayana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elatostematoides manillensis var. panayana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various types of infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
